profile.name: Aker ASA
profile.about: Aker ASA is a Norwegian industrial investment company founded in 1841, headquartered in Fornebu, Norway and listed on Oslo Børs. Aker exercises active ownership across a portfolio of companies concentrated in oil and gas, renewable energy, industrial software, seafood, and marine biotechnology. Key portfolio companies include Aker BP (oil & gas), Aker Solutions (energy services), Aker BioMarine (krill/omega-3), Cognite (industrial AI software), and Solstad Offshore (vessels). The company is 68.2% owned by Kjell Inge Røkke through TRG Holding AS. CEO is Øyvind Eriksen. Aker has generated an average annual total return of 25% since relisting on Oslo Børs in September 2004.

people.name: Øyvind Eriksen
people.title: President & CEO
people.bio: CEO of Aker ASA. Former partner and chairman at law firm BAHR. Law degree from University of Oslo.

people.name: Kjell Inge Røkke
people.title: Chairman
people.bio: Main shareholder (68.2% via TRG Holding AS). Controlling shareholder and architect of the Aker Group.

keyFacts.label: Main shareholder
keyFacts.value: Kjell Inge Røkke — 68.2% via TRG Holding AS
